Fragaria x ananassa, commonly known as the strawberry plant, is a perennial plant that produces edible strawberries. The health benefits of Fragaria x ananassa include its high antioxidant content, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Fragaria x ananassa include anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and salicylic acid, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Fragaria x ananassa include fresh strawberries, strawberry jam, and dried strawberry powder, which are often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules for their potential health benefits.
